calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KEVIN J. WOODS, Esq. of White & Woods PC (Tel: 415-231-5709) for petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed petition to confirm contractual arbitration award is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
